name: Lessors of Nonresidential Buildings
rationale: Strong job coverage (8.75, 7/8 steps) + fragmented incumbent landscape (6.0 — Voltfang, Tesvolt, Commeo, in-house FM all sub-scale). Heaviest mitigable load in set (5.0; 7 mitigable inc. MV headroom on retail/office + Baugenehmigung discretion). Single-source-EPC pitch resonates with landlords.
